scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run test:build && npm run build:dist
scripts.build:full: npm run typecheck && npm run test:build:full && npm run build:dist
scripts.check:all: npm run typecheck && npm run test:all && npm run build:dist
scripts.test:build: vitest run tests/unit --exclude tests/unit/cffp-series.spec.ts --exclude tests/unit/mei-io.spec.ts --exclude tests/unit/musescore-io.spec.ts --exclude tests/unit/lilypond-io.spec.ts --exclude tests/unit/playback-flow.spec.ts --exclude tests/unit/midi-roundtrip-golden.spec.ts
scripts.test:build:full: vitest run tests/unit --exclude tests/unit/cffp-series.spec.ts --exclude tests/unit/mei-io.spec.ts --exclude tests/unit/musescore-io.spec.ts
